name: antigravity-control-center
description: Control Center for Antigravity providing access to Conversation History, Agents, MCPs, Skills and more..

controlCenter.openMode.description: Choose the visualization layer to render the Control Center dashboard. 'webview' launches an integrated, sandboxed editor panel tab inside the IDE (with full retain-on-hide contexts). 'external' initializes a local loopback server binding solely to 127.0.0.1 and fires a standalone browser panel window (ideal for multi-monitor developers).

controlCenter.defaultTab.description: Define the module that resolves first on launch. Options: Conversations (transcript logs), McpServers (schema viewer), Skills (expert protocols), Agents (personas), Rules (mandated standards), Workflows (slash commands), Knowledge (curated KIs), or Settings (system guide).

controlCenter.dataDirectory.description: The directory where Antigravity stores its operational state. This path serves as the root for compiling the 'brain' transcripts in '{dataDirectory}/brain/', resolving FastMCP v2 server directories in '{dataDirectory}/mcp/', and parsing curated Knowledge Items (KIs) in '{dataDirectory}/knowledge/'. If left blank, it defaults to the user's home fallback (~/.gemini/antigravity-ide).
